messages.content: I've an asp.net core with reactjs project, I'm getting a list from the controller and the list contains an image path per item, how do i import each image? notice that they all share a common path which is: "ClientApp/public/taskimgs/imageName.png"
edit the image path to be suitable for the component that is located in "C:\Users\kingk\Desktop\Cryptotaskys\cryptotasky\ClientApp\src\components\comp.js"
Module not found: Error: Can't resolve '../taskimgs'

Module build failed (from ./node_modules/babel-loader/lib/index.js):
SyntaxError: C:\Users\kingk\Desktop\Cryptotaskys\cryptotasky\ClientApp\src\components\ndsectask.js: Invalid regular expression flag. (525:116)
what if the variable already has this path? "ClientApp/public/taskimgs/8194c3a6-ca0c-4519-a6a5-86ce27cb0615.png"

The result should be like this: 'src="../../public/taskimgs/04aa7c33-4a23-49d6-b07c-2c79c9f41c88.png"' and the variable contains this: "ClientApp/public/taskimgs/8194c3a6-ca0c-4519-a6a5-86ce27cb0615.png" write a code to reach the desired path
